title: lotus parviflorus
intro: Lotus parviflorus, also known as the American lotus or small-flowered lotus, is a perennial aquatic plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Lotus parviflorus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce swelling and pain, and support kidney and urinary tract function. Lotus parviflorus is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be consumed as a raw or dried herb, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for its medicinal purposes.
